headline: CI Q1 Deep Dive: Specialty Growth, Portfolio Reshaping, and New Pharmacy Model Drive Outlook
summary: Health insurance company Cigna (NYSE:CI) announced better-than-expected revenue in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 4.7% year on year to $68.52 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $7.79 per share was 2.4% above analysts’ consensus estimates.
